title: An Act authorizing the city of Salem to prohibit the application of second generation anti-coagulant rodenticides within its borders

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Cruz of Salem, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4091) of Manny Cruz (with the approval of the mayor and city council) that the city of Salem be authorized to prohibit the use of second generation anti-coagulant rodenticides in said city.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
